title: Find My Device - Sending Tone - back button
scenario: Find My Device tone does not stop when tapping back arrow to return to App Settings page
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Scroll to and tap on 'Find My Device'
Tap 'Play Tone' or equivalent to start playing a tone
While the tone is playing, tap the back arrow (←) in the top left corner of the screen
expected: The tone stops playing immediately and the user is returned to the Device Settings page.
